examples: Do you see that rose-colored silk curtain hanging on the wall over the mantel-piece?
She said nothing today but she sat and looked fixedly at the picture over the mantel.
"Writers are made by reading," says Mantel.
Mantel is the first woman and the first living British author to win the prestigious literary prize twice.
Bring up the Bodies will be shorter than the 672-page Wolf Hall, Mantel added.
